channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Police report on youth altercation in Guelph
item.description: On April 16, 2026, local authorities in Guelph, Ontario, reported that approximately twelve youths were involved in a physical altercation in the city. The incident prompted a police response to ensur...

item.title: Nigeria security forces on alert over planned attacks on Abuja airport and prison
item.description: Security agencies for Nigeria have put themselves on high alert after intelligence reports pointed to possible attacks on key facilities in Abuja and Niger State. The warning, carried in an internal m...

item.title: Dr. Amir Levine Explains How to Develop a Secure Attachment Style
item.description: Dr. Amir Levine, associate professor of clinical psychiatry at Columbia University, explores how attachment styles shape relationships and emotional well-being in his latest book, “Secure: The Revolut...

item.title: Ontario coroner’s inquest examines death of Indigenous woman after two-day ER visit
item.description: The Ontario coroner’s inquest into the death of Heather Winterstein, a 24-year-old Indigenous woman from the Cayuga Nation with connections to Six Nations of the Grand River, continues its 12th day. W...

item.title: Jury Rules Live Nation and Ticketmaster Monopolized Major US Venues
item.description: A U.S. jury has found that Live Nation and Ticketmaster, two major players in the live entertainment industry, effectively controlled a monopoly over large concert venues across the country. The rulin...

item.title: Home Office launches investigation into false asylum and domestic abuse claims
item.description: The Home Office has initiated an investigation following a BBC report that revealed some migrants were being guided to make false claims of being gay or victims of domestic abuse to remain in the UK. ...

item.title: Bombay High Court advises Republic TV to stick to factual reporting in coverage of Anil Ambani case
item.description: The Bombay High Court has advised Republic TV and its editor Arnab Goswami to avoid adding any ‘embellishments’ while reporting on financial transactions and ongoing investigations involving businessm...

item.title: Canadian Armed Forces use humour on social media to engage public and boost recruitment
item.description: The Canadian Armed Forces (CAF) have recently taken a lighter approach on social media, embracing humour and playful content to engage Canadians, particularly younger audiences. Using accounts such as...

item.title: Indian Americans Face Racism Within the Republican Party Despite High-Level Roles
item.description: Indian Americans have played prominent roles in the Trump administration, holding positions such as White House deputy press secretary, FBI director, and National Institutes of Health director. Despit...

item.title: US Plans Mine-Clearing Operations in Strait of Hormuz Amid Iran Tensions
item.description: Donald Trump has announced plans to begin anti-mine operations in the Strait of Hormuz, which Iran has effectively blocked to shipping since the US and Israel launched a war earlier this year. Iran ha...

item.title: Tanzania records highest ever investment approvals with 915 projects in 2025
item.description: Tanzania has recorded a very strong increase in investment approvals in the year 2025, reaching a total of 915 registered projects valued at 10.95 billion US dollars. This marks the highest number sin...

item.title: Ex-Lawmaker Zaldy Co Detained in Prague for Improper Entry
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. confirmed on Thursday night via his Facebook posts that former lawmaker Zaldy Co has been arrested in Prague, Czech Republic. Co is reportedly detained by Czech authorit...

item.title: Content Creator Naomi Kuria Recounts Carjacking Experience in Nairobi
item.description: Kenyan content creator and influencer Naomi Kuria has opened up about a frightening incident where she was carjacked at gunpoint earlier this year. The popular digital personality revealed that the te...

item.title: Islamabad enhances security measures as second round of US-Iran talks may be hosted in Pakistan
item.description: Islamabad police and security agencies have stepped up preparations on Thursday as rumours grow stronger about the federal capital hosting the second round of direct talks between the United States an...

item.title: AFN Demands Full Disclosure and Inquiry into Historical RCMP Surveillance of Indigenous Communities
item.description: The head of the Assembly of First Nations (AFN), National Chief Cindy Woodhouse Nepinak, has publicly rejected the RCMP’s recent statement of regret regarding a secret surveillance program that monito...

item.title: Aliko Dangote Makes TIME 100 List For 2026 Alongside Global Leaders
item.description: Industrialist and philanthropist Aliko Dangote don dey among TIME Magazine top 100 most influential people for 2026. This na him second time for the list, first one na for 2014. Dangote dey join big n...

item.title: KLM Officials Booked Following Complaint Over Boarding Pass Denial at Bengaluru Airport
item.description: Bengaluru authorities have booked officials of KLM Royal Dutch Airlines after a complaint from J.S. Sathish Kumar, chairman of Annapoorna Medical College and Hospitals in Tamil Nadu, alleging that his...

item.title: IMF warns Africa’s economic recovery is losing momentum due to global and structural challenges
item.description: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has issued a warning that sub-Saharan Africa’s recent economic progress is being threatened by growing global instability, mounting debt, and shrinking developmen...

item.title: Family of Irma Palasics speaks of relief as two men found guilty of her manslaughter in 26‑year‑old Canberra cold case
item.description: The family of Irma Palasics, a Canberra grandmother who was killed in a brutal home invasion in 1999, has spoken of relief and gratitude after two Melbourne men were found guilty of her manslaughter b...

item.title: Lawmakers Called to Invest in Sanitation and Clean Water for Health Facilities
item.description: Members of Parliament in Tanzania have been encouraged to give more attention to investment in water, sanitation, and hygiene (WASH) services within health facilities, after growing concerns about uns...
